title: rosa pendulina var. intermedia
intro: Rosa pendulina var. intermedia, also known as the intermediate alpine rose or Rosa pendulina hybrid, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a natural hybrid of Rosa pendulina and Rosa rubiginosa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins. The medicinal properties of Rosa pendulina var. intermedia have been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Rosa pendulina var. intermedia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the production of rose oil and other pharmaceutical products.
